name: Electrocuted by faulty wiring on Provo site—who to sue besides employer?

mainEntity.name: Electrocuted by faulty wiring on Provo site—who to sue besides employer?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Subcontractor, equipment manufacturer, site owner for negligence or defects.** Duty to inspect[2]. **Key factors:** 1. Who controlled wiring. 2. OSHA violations. 3. Product liability. 4. 4-year limit. Preserve equipment. Lawyer traces liability chain.
